task_completion.description: Update the stale ExxonMobil deal to Closed Lost with 0% probability
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the SuiteCRM Opportunities list or the ExxonMobil detail view showing the Sales Stage changed to 'Closed Lost' and Probability set to '0'.

task_completion.description: Update the stale J&J deal to Closed Lost with 0% probability
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the SuiteCRM Opportunities list or the J&J detail view showing the Sales Stage changed to 'Closed Lost' and Probability set to '0'.

task_completion.description: Update the future close date for the Closed Won Apple deal
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the SuiteCRM Opportunities list or the 'Apple - ML Infrastructure Renewal' detail view showing the Expected Close Date updated to a date in the past.

task_completion.description: Align probabilities with sales stages for NVIDIA and AT&T
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the NVIDIA and AT&T opportunity records with their probabilities updated to standard values that match their active sales stages (e.g., no longer 0% or 100% since they are active).

task_completion.description: Align probabilities with sales stages for Goldman Sachs and GE Aviation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Goldman Sachs and GE Aviation opportunity records with their probabilities updated to standard values that match their active sales stages (e.g., GE Aviation should no longer be 100%).

integrity.description: Agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the SuiteCRM GUI in a web browser, rather than executing SQL queries or terminal scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: Agent successfully saved the modified records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the updated values in the standard SuiteCRM detail or list views, confirming the 'Save' action was completed, rather than just showing text typed into edit fields.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify internally consistent records
integrity.visual_evidence: Other opportunities in the list view that were not part of the required fixes remain unchanged with their original stages, probabilities, and close dates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 1. There are exactly 2 stale deals (ExxonMobil and J&J) that must be updated to 'Closed Lost' and 0% probability. 2. There is exactly 1 Closed Won deal ('Apple - ML Infrastructure Renewal') that must have its close date changed to the past. 3. There are exactly 4 deals with probability mismatches (NVIDIA, AT&T, Goldman Sachs, GE Aviation) that must have their probabilities adjusted to correctly align with their active sales stages.
